header: From composer require to a themed site in 30 minutes

items.content: Install. Add webconsulting/desiderio to a TYPO3 14.3 project with Composer. One package registers 244 Content Blocks elements, 49 Fluid 5 components, and the theme layer — GPL-licensed, no key, no signup, no catch.

Seed. Run desiderio:styleguide:seed and a complete demo site appears in one command. Workspaces-safe and idempotent, so you can re-run it after every upgrade without duplicates — your sandbox stays pristine forever.

Theme. Pick one of 15 shadcn presets in site settings, or give individual page subtrees their own. Colors, radius, and typography update everywhere at runtime — the redesign that used to be a quarter is now a click.
